title: AI Digital Employee? Claude Tagging & The AI Market Revealed! #shorts
summary: A video exploring how AI assistants like Claude are transforming Slack and Microsoft Teams workflows. The piece covers the evolving AI market landscape and introduces the concept of loop engineering as an innovative application area.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof looks at how AI assistants such as Claude are being integrated into Slack and Microsoft Teams workflows, framed around the idea of an AI digital employee. It surveys the current AI market landscape and introduces loop engineering as an emerging application area. The takeaways center on conversational AI moving into everyday team communication tools and prompt engineering practices shaping how these assistants operate.
